name: io.github.ivo-toby/postgram
title: Postgram
description: Self-hosted memory for AI agents with hybrid search, knowledge graphs, tasks, and document sync.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using a Postgram API key created with pgm-admin or the admin UI.

environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection URL for a database with the pgvector extension enabled.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required only when OpenAI is selected for embeddings or extraction.

environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Ollama embedding endpoint when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER is ollama.

environmentVariables.name: ADMIN_MFA_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Stable random value of at least 32 characters used to protect admin MFA seeds.

environmentVariables.name: ADMIN_SETTINGS_ENCRYPTION_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Stable 32-byte base64url key used to encrypt provider secrets saved in the admin UI.
